name: Sniper/Trading Bot (UNVERIFIED)
note: Source not published on Etherscan. ABI/selectors recovered from runtime bytecode. The exploited function selector is 0x213d8e67: f(address token, bytes data, uint256, uint256) which performs token.call(data) with NO access control. Other selectors include 0x8da5cb5b owner(), 0x3af32abf isWhitelisted(address), 0x3fc8cef3 WETH() getter, 0x5c11d795 (swapExactTokensForTokens via router), 0x23b872dd transferFrom (relayed).
